message:
fix(fcp-protocol): add minimum frame length validation to FCPS decode paths

Add explicit MIN_LEN constants to both FcpsFrame::decode() and
SignedFcpsFrame::decode() that enforce minimum byte counts before
attempting deserialization. Returns FrameError::TooShort immediately
when input is below the minimum (header + version + timestamp +
signature bytes), preventing malformed frame processing that could
cause panics or undefined behavior in downstream parsing.

Move MIN_LEN to the beginning of decode functions for visibility.
Fix test cases to use explicit field construction instead of struct
update syntax, and rename decode_status_sign_and_verify to
decode_status_sign_and_verify_with_helper for clarity. Correct
test schema ID casing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
